idea-plugin.name: TODO++
idea-plugin.description:
Turbocharge Your TODOs with TODO++

TODO++ (Todo Plus) transforms standard TODO comments into a powerful task management system directly within IntelliJ IDEA. Organize, track, and complete tasks without leaving your code.

✨ Status: v2.1.0

🔥 Key Features:

  • Multi-Selection & Batch Completion: Select multiple TODO items or whole group headers and toggle completion in batch!
  • Live Auto-Scan on Typing: Real-time debounced updates as you type in the editor.
  • Quick Fixes (Alt + Enter): Instantly mark TODOs as completed or incomplete directly from your code editor.
  • Progress Bar & Completion Stats: Live progress bar and completion ratio readout in the status bar with high-contrast rendering.
  • Copy for Standup: 1-click export of selected/visible TODOs to Slack/Markdown format for daily standups.
  • Multi-Line TODO Support: Seamlessly extracts indented bullet points and continuation lines under TODO comments.
  • Custom Keyword Recognition: Parses HACK:, BUG:, NOTE:, OPTIMIZE: in addition to standard TODO/FIXME.
  • Interactive Audio Feedback: Crisp completion chimes on task completion and pop sounds on reverting.
  • Executive PDF & HTML Reports: Export formatted, printable PDF reports with priority breakdown charts.
  • Entire Solution & CSHTML / Rider Support: Added Entire Solution / Project scope and full support for .cshtml, .razor, .vue, .svelte, .dart, and all JetBrains IDEs.
  • Custom Priority Badges: Visual priority badges (🟣 Critical, 🔴 High, 🟠 Medium, 🟢 Low) rendered in the tree view.
  • Smart Due Date Notifications: Automatically reminds you via native IDE balloon popups about any TODOs that are overdue or due today!

📝 Usage Examples:

// TODO(@john priority:critical due:today): Fix production crash
// HACK(@alice priority:high): Workaround for layout glitch
# BUG(issue:PROJ-456): Refactor database schema (Python support!)

Installation Note: Please restart the IDE after installation to ensure all features load correctly.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
v2.1.0 Release Notes:

  • Block Comment TODO Detection: TODOs inside /* TODO: ... */ and mid-line if (x /* TODO: ... */) { are now correctly detected across all supported languages.
  • Javadoc / KDoc Support: /** TODO: ... */ style comments are now scanned.
  • Customisable HTML Export: Override the page title, CSS styles (including criticality colours), stats counters block, list/table section, and add a custom footer — all from Settings.
  • Priority Group Sorting: When grouped by Priority, tree nodes now sort by urgency (Critical → High → Medium → Low) instead of alphabetically.
  • Large File Safety Guard: Files over 5MB are automatically skipped to prevent out-of-memory errors on large generated assets.

v2.0.0 Major Milestone Release Notes:

  • Multi-Selection & Batch Actions: Select multiple TODOs or group headers and click Mark Completed or Mark Incomplete.
  • Live Auto-Scan: Real-time background scanning while typing in any editor buffer.
  • Quick Fixes (Alt + Enter): Added Mark TODO as Completed and Mark DONE as Incomplete editor intentions.
  • Visual Progress Bar: High-contrast completion progress bar (e.g. 66% (8/12)) in the status footer.
  • Copy for Standup: 1-click button to format and copy tasks to clipboard for Slack/Teams daily standups.
  • Multi-Line TODO Comments: Supports indented bullet points and multi-line task descriptions.
  • Custom Keyword Parsing: Supports HACK, BUG, NOTE, OPTIMIZE keywords.
  • Interactive Audio FX: Audio sound feedback chimes on task state toggles.
  • Executive PDF Reports: 1-click PDF task report generation with browser preview.
  • Enhanced Scope & Rider / CSHTML Support: Added Entire Solution / Project scope and full support for .cshtml, .razor, .vue, .svelte, .dart, and all non-binary text files.
  • Priority Badges: Colored badges (🟣 Critical, 🔴 High, 🟠 Medium, 🟢 Low) rendered in the tree view.
  • 100% Deprecated API Free: Verified against IntelliJ 2024.1+ APIs with zero warnings.
